description: Artisan is an AI outbound platform with an AI BDR, Ava, that automates prospecting, personalization, and email and LinkedIn outreach from a built-in B2B database.
overview: Artisan automates outbound with an AI BDR named Ava, pairing a large B2B contact database and intent signals with personalized email and LinkedIn outreach.
what_is: Artisan is an AI-first outbound platform that automates the busywork of prospecting. Its AI BDR, Ava, handles research, lead sourcing, and personalized email and LinkedIn outreach, drawing on a large database of verified B2B contacts.

It is built for startups, mid-market, and enterprise teams that want faster pipeline without expanding the SDR bench. Automating research and follow-ups frees reps to focus on conversations and closing.
Artisan enhances CRM and email workflows with data and deliverability tooling. It is aimed at scaling personalized outbound rather than inbound lead management or complex account-based programs.
